title: Berlin in April 2027 - Quick Summary
items: Berlin in April is spring in full swing: blossoming, green and lively, with long evenings, but with famously changeable weather.

Berlin.de lists average April highs of 13.3 degrees Celsius, lows of 3.4 degrees, about 5.3 hours of sunshine, nine rainy days, and 40 mm of rain, and says anything from bright sunshine to steady rain is possible.
The evenings are long: sunset moves from around 7:56 pm on April 1 to about 8:43 pm by April 30.
April is cherry blossom season, with famous displays along the former Berlin Wall, plus Gallery Weekend and Walpurgisnacht on April 30.
In 2027, Easter falls in March, not April, so April is mostly free of holiday closures.
